info.description: API for WhatsApp automation using WhatsMeow.
info.title: WhatsMeow Basileia API

get.description: Returns a list of all active instances

post.description: Generates a new device ID and initializes a client

delete.description: Deletes an instance, terminates connection and drops metadata

get.description: Connects to SSE stream to receive QR codes for pairing

put.description: Updates the name of an existing device/instance

get.description: Returns the connection status of the device

post.description: Connects the instance to WhatsApp and returns a base64 QR Code if not logged in.

404.description: Device not found or not loaded

post.description: Creates a new WhatsApp instance compatible with UazAPI guidelines. Returns a token to be used in the header for subsequent requests.

400.description: Invalid request body or missing name

get.description: Returns the latest logs stored in memory

post.description: Sends an interactive button message specifically designed to copy text (Queued)
post.summary: Send an interactive copy button (eg. Copy PIX)
Send a media message (image, video, document, audio)

post.description:
Sends different types of messages (contact, location, status, menu, carousel, payment, pix, presence) via UazAPI format.
To send presence, use `/message/presence` with `{ "number": "...", "presence": "composing" }`.
For menus/lists, use `/send/menu` with `{ "number": "...", "listButton": "Ver", "choices": ["[Geral]", "Opção 1|op1"] }`.

get.description: Returns message volume stats per hour

copy_code.description: The actual content to be copied (e.g. PIX payload)

media_url.description: Public URL to download the media from
